channel.title: Cosmos DB on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Cosmos DB on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Backup for Cosmos DB
item.description:
Azure Backup for Cosmos DB is now in public preview. It adds vaulted backups for Cosmos DB accounts to support cyber-resiliency, compliance, and isolated backup storage.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: OmniVec, an open-source embedding toolkit for Azure
item.description:
Microsoft announced a public preview of OmniVec, an open-source embedding toolkit for Azure. It automates embedding generation from multiple data sources and writes results to Azure Cosmos DB and other Azure destinations.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: Retirement: Azure Cosmos DB for PostgreSQL will retire on March 31, 2029
item.description:
Azure Cosmos DB for PostgreSQL will be retired on March 31, 2029. Users must migrate to Azure Database for PostgreSQL Elastic Cluster before that date.

  • Source: Azure Updates
